    Enum CadFontStyleTableFlag

    Font style table flags.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad.CadConsts
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    [Flags]
[ComVisible(false)]
public enum CadFontStyleTableFlag

    Fields

    Name Description
    Bold

    Bold style.
    BoldItalic

    Bold italic style.
    FixedPitch

    Fixed pitch (monospace font).
    Italic

    Italic style.
    None

    Empty flag.
    Roman

    Roman family (serif).
    Swiss

    Swiss family (sans serif).
    VariablePitch

    Variable pitch.
